channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How to use and maximize Delta’s TakeOff 15 feature to save on award tickets
item.description: If you have a Delta cobranded credit card, you can save 15% on all award tickets. Here's everything you need to know about using Delta's TakeOff 15 be...

item.description: We’ve made it to week 78, which means these weekly meal plans are working! Thank you for letting me be…

item.description: The Delta SkyMiles Reserve American Express Card is the top-tier credit card from Amex and Delta Air Lines. Let's dive into whether this card is right...

item.title: Deal alert: Points and miles travel deals for February 2026
item.description: Save, maximize and earn points and miles on various travel purchases this February.

item.title: Expedition cruises: The ultimate guide to cruising to remote, hard-to-reach places
item.description: Expedition cruises can take you to Antarctica, the Arctic, the Galapagos, the Amazon River and other off-the-beaten-path places.

item.title: How to get your fourth reward night free when redeeming IHG points
item.description: Here's what you need to know about IHG's fourth-night-free benefit, including how to get it as a perk of select IHG One Rewards credit cards.

item.title: The CDC Has a Leadership Crisis

item.title: Mountain Rescue Script Flipped as Hiker Saves Lost Dog Instead of a Dog Saving Hiker

item.title: Remember HQ? ‘Quiz Daddy’ Scott Rogowsky is back with TextSavvy, a daily mobile game show
item.description: The former HQ host Scott Rogowsky is back with TextSavvy, a live mobile game show that he's building on his own terms.
